name: Start any building upgrade
notes: Can be done in either Home Village or Builder Base.
Also awarded if a building construction is started.
Does not apply to Wall upgrades.
If a building upgrade is cancelled and restarted, the restarted upgrade will not award a stamp.

name: Start any troop upgrade
notes: Can be done in either Home Village or Builder Base.

name: Start any Hero or Pet upgrade
notes: Can be done in either Home Village or Builder Base.
Rebuilding the Battle Machine counts as a building construction, so that stamp is awarded instead.

name: Donate reinforcements
notes: Only one stamp can be earned per request, so donating multiple units will not give multiple copies.

name: Complete a Star Bonus
notes: Can be done in either Home Village or Builder Base.

name: Win a battle
notes: Can be done in either Home Village or Builder Base. A win in the Builder Base is defined as scoring at least one star.
Can also be done in Home Village Friendly Challenges, and single-player battles (including Practice Mode battles, Attack Challenges and the Super Sauna playground level).

name: Destroy a Town Hall
notes: Can be done in either Home Village or Builder Base. In the latter case, destroying a Builder Hall qualifies, but not an O.T.T.O's Outpost.
Can also be done in Home Village Friendly Challenges, and single-player battles (including Practice Mode battles, Attack Challenges and the Super Sauna playground level).
